goal: Production-ready SaaS: CAPTCHA + email verification + Postgres-CI isolation tests + key recovery + local embedding-based semantic search. Zero provider calls.

phases.goal: Integrate Cloudflare Turnstile (optional) into POST /console/api/bootstrap. When ALFRED_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY + ALFRED_TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY are set, the client must send X-Turnstile-Token and the server verifies it via siteverify. When unset, the endpoint behaves as in v0.3.1 (backward compatible).
deliverables: tests: captcha valid, captcha invalid, captcha off (backward compat)

phases.goal: Add optional email capture to bootstrap. If provided, server generates a verification token, stores it, and (when SMTP is configured) sends a magic link. The link marks the tenant as email_verified and emits the API key.
deliverables: tests: token valid, expired, reused, SMTP unconfigured (skip + log)

phases.goal: Add a CI workflow that runs the cross-tenant isolation test suite against a real Postgres cluster (via docker-compose). Block PRs that fail this test.
deliverables: updated cross-tenant-isolation gate (existing 15 vectors + new real-Postgres vector)

phases.goal: Add /console/api/recover (forgot-my-key) endpoint. User submits email, server generates a one-shot recovery token, sends a magic link with the new API key. Old key is revoked.
deliverables: packages/memory-server/src/bootstrap/recovery.js (token store + issue new key + revoke old)
tests: token valid, expired, reused, rate limit 3/IP/hour, key rotation

phases.goal: Add local embedding-based semantic search to the memory stores. Model: @xenova/transformers with Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (22MB, MIT, 384-dim). Zero provider calls. searchMemories accepts mode: 'semantic' | 'keyword' | 'hybrid' (default hybrid).
deliverables: background worker: enqueue embedding on create/update
tests: cosine similarity, hybrid ranking, no-results, model unavailable (fallback to keyword)

phases.goal: Cut 0.4.0 release candidate with full validation, new eval datasets, and reproducible CHANGELOG.
deliverables: regression-gates.json updated with all new gates

entry_criteria: ALFRED_SAAS_DATABASE_URL is documented in the README
exit_criteria: CAPTCHA is integrated and tested (off by default, on when configured)
Email verification is integrated and tested (off when SMTP unconfigured)
CI runs cross-tenant isolation against real Postgres
Forgot-my-key works end-to-end with email magic link
Semantic search works with the local model and falls back to keyword if model unavailable
release-0.4.0 is reproducible and fully gated
non_goals_for_0_4_0: Federated sync between agent instances (deferred to v0.5.0)
